name: Low-Cal Carrot Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Granulated fructose (or any similar sweetener)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour a 3-quart tube pan.
3. In a mixing bowl, cream together the shortening, granulated fructose, and eggs until light and lemon-colored.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (flour, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, salt) except for the carrots and pecans. Beat well.
5. Stir in the grated carrots and chopped pecans.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 30-40 minutes.
8. The recipe yields 16 servings at approximately 229 calories each.
From: Diabetic Dessert Cookbook
Reposted by Nancy O'Brion via Meal-Master
